CurrentIssues.ID: MaxLineLength:RankedWindow.kt$/** Rank of the first element in a "better-than-anchor" window, given the anchor's own [anchorRank] and how many entries beat it ([betterCount]). Never below rank 1. */

MaxLineLength:RankedWindow.kt$/** Stamps consecutive ranks onto [entries] (already in display order), starting at [startRank]. Shared by every [com.leaderboardkit.domain.repository.LeaderboardRepository] implementation. */
